name: Vitality
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Rest Areas provide an additional option: {Destroy} up to 3 Symptom cards, obtain [StateArg1] Black Sigils. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."
lore: On the brink of death, the will to live ignites.
